payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Front-facing dark-stained wooden dresser with six drawers (two columns of three), recessed paneled drawer fronts and curved metal pull handles; lower-left is partially occluded by a bed and the right edge is slightly cropped — approximately 1.5 meters from camera.

message.content: {"label":"dresser","short_description":"dark wooden six-drawer dresser, partial","long_description":"Front-facing dark-stained wooden dresser with six drawers (two columns of three), recessed paneled drawer fronts and curved metal pull handles; lower-left is partially occluded by a bed and the right edge is slightly cropped — approximately 1.5 meters from camera.","attributes":["dark-stained wood finish","six drawers (2x3 layout)","recessed paneled drawer fronts","curved metal pull handles","rectangular flat top","polished/sheened surface","partially occluded by bed (lower-left)","right edge slightly cropped","traditional/classic styling"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
